label: Maximum unit size
description: Detached ADU floor area must not exceed 1,200 sq ft (LAMC §12.22 A.33(c)); up to 800 sq ft is allowed by right.

label: Height limit (attached ADU)
description: Attached ADU height limited to 16 ft where it must match the primary dwelling (Gov. Code §66323 / HCD).

label: Height limit (detached ADU)
description: Detached ADU may be up to 18 ft (16 ft base + 2 ft to match roof pitch, or near transit / on a multifamily lot) per Gov. Code §66323 / HCD.

label: Rear setback
description: Minimum 4 ft rear yard setback for a detached ADU (LAMC §12.22 A.33(d)).

label: Side setback
description: Minimum 4 ft side yard setback for a detached ADU (LAMC §12.22 A.33(d)).

label: Required documents
description: LA City Planning ADU submittal requires a site plan, floor plan, building elevations, and a Title-24 energy compliance report.

label: Height limit (single-family)
description: One-family dwellings in the R1 zone are limited to 33 ft / 2.5 stories on most lots (LAMC §12.21.1 A.1); lower limits apply in some Height Districts and hillside areas.

label: Front setback (single-family)
description: R1 front yard is generally the prevailing setback, commonly 20 ft (LAMC §12.08 C); confirm the block's prevailing-setback average.

label: Rear setback (single-family)
description: R1 rear yard minimum is 15 ft (LAMC §12.08 C).

label: Side setback (single-family)
description: R1 side yard minimum is 5 ft (or 10% of lot width up to a cap) per LAMC §12.08 C.

label: Lot coverage (single-family)
description: Residential lot coverage in R1 is generally capped around 45% of lot area (LAMC §12.21.1); verify the specific zone.

label: Floor area ratio (single-family)
description: R1 Residential Floor Area is limited to 0.5:1 of lot area (LAMC §12.21.1 A.5), before applicable bonuses.

label: Off-street parking (single-family)
description: A single-family dwelling requires 2 off-street covered parking spaces (LAMC §12.21 A.4); transit-proximate reductions may apply.

label: Height limit (multi-family)
description: Multi-family height in lower-density R3 is commonly limited to 45 ft in Height District 1 (LAMC §12.21.1 A.1); the exact limit is set by the lot's Height District.

label: Front setback (multi-family)
description: R3 front yard minimum is 15 ft (LAMC §12.11 C).

label: Rear setback (multi-family)
description: R3 rear yard minimum is 15 ft (LAMC §12.11 C).

label: Side setback (multi-family)
description: R3 side yard minimum is generally 5 ft plus 1 ft per story above the second (LAMC §12.11 C).

label: Off-street parking (multi-family)
description: R3 generally requires 1–2 parking spaces per dwelling unit by unit size (LAMC §12.21 A.4); AB 2097 removes minimums within ½ mile of major transit. Per-unit ratio needs manual confirmation against the unit count.
